claim_family: original product-post launch and feature frame
extracted_support: S-0079 is now locally text-rendered as the official OpenAI product post for Introducing ChatGPT Enterprise; it supports OpenAI-attributed original-post language about enterprise security/privacy, higher-speed GPT-4, longer context, advanced data analysis, customization, and availability to businesses.
quote_permission: short original-post snippets allowed with renderer caveat; use S-0089 for local launch-date backup

prohibited_use: Do not treat the post as independent evidence of adoption, market penetration, or productivity outcomes.
remaining_blocker: The local text render omits the visible August 28, 2023 date; keep S-0089 or official web-reader date evidence attached when dating the post.

extracted_support: The post says OpenAI had seen ChatGPT account registrations associated with more than 80 percent of Fortune 500 companies, and its footnote defines this as registered ChatGPT accounts tied to corporate email domains.

prohibited_use: Do not write that over 80 percent of Fortune 500 companies bought ChatGPT Enterprise, deployed Enterprise, used it actively, or achieved outcomes from it.
remaining_blocker: Still needs independent/customer-side corroboration before becoming a neutral adoption claim.
